This field is populated from the provider number (the CCN), from the first claim record included in the 
stay, modified as follows. 

If position 3 of the provider number is one of the alpha characters on the list below, and position 4 is 
numeric, then populate position 3 of this field with the following numeric values: 

Psych/Rehab Unit or Swing Bed Unit in a CAH: 

If “M”, “R” or “Z”, populate “1”
